title: Indexes, Query Plans, Operator Costs, and Responsible Tuning · Query Repair Bay
summary: A growing ticket dataset makes queue and analytics queries slow, but each new index adds write and storage cost. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in an evidence-backed query performance dossier and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain B-tree and hash-style index strengths, ordering, lookup, storage, and update tradeoffs.
Order composite keys from predicates and sorting needs and identify prefix and covering behavior.
Estimate selectivity and compare scans, seeks, lookups, and join access paths from data distribution.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.sql:
-- sql-basics cumulative relational data portfolio.
-- Each increment declares grain, predicts cardinality or changed rows, runs in fresh browser SQLite,
-- reconciles results, tests changed data, and records PostgreSQL or standard-SQL boundaries.

SELECT sqlite_version() AS browser_sqlite_version;

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Index Structures
steps.instruction:
debug case — Queue queries filter status and severity, order by opened_at, and join owner_id across 5000 modeled rows. Compare baseline and indexed plans, preserve results, and account for insert and storage cost.

Inspect the Index Structures trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Index Structures.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for explain b-tree and hash-style index strengths, ordering, lookup, storage, and update tradeoffs. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Index Structures, keep Index Structures connected to executable relational evidence.

content.text: For Index Structures, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Index Structures, challenge the documented misconception with result, constraint, or plan evidence: An index is a free sorted copy of the whole table.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Performance Experiment
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable SQLite increment headed "-- Evidence: sql-performance-experiment-4p8lac" with a concrete grain, hypothesis, or prediction; index, access-path, plan, or controlled-performance evidence; and an observation, reconciliation, or verification tied to returned rows, changed rows, an error, or a plan.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Performance Experiment.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Performance Experiment into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Performance Experiment, keep Performance Experiment connected to executable relational evidence.

content.code:
-- Evidence: sql-performance-experiment-4p8lac
-- grain: declare the exact row or mutation grain before running
EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN
SELECT ticket_id FROM tickets WHERE owner_id = 1 ORDER BY opened_at;
-- observation: reconcile the returned rows, changed count, error, or plan with the prediction

steps.title: Publish the incident record · Debug Performance Experiment
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Performance Experiment: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Queue queries filter status and severity, order by opened_at, and join owner_id across 3000 modeled rows. Compare baseline and indexed plans, preserve results, and account for insert and storage cost.

Evidence target: Publish the incident record · Debug Performance Experiment.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Publish the incident record · Debug Performance Experiment, keep Performance Experiment connected to executable relational evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Benchmark representative warmed and cold cases, verify unchanged results, and account for write amplification.
